title: cineraria vallis-pacis
intro: Cineraria vallis-pacis, also known as Cineraria or African Cornflower, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cineraria vallis-pacis are believed to provide relief from pain, fever, and inflammation, while also supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Cineraria vallis-pacis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
